creator: dhagan@cs.vt.edu
text:
This port should be updated to 2.5.3 (still available from the FTP site at
UVA).  The 2.4 series has a date problem (mail is sent with a timestamp of
xx Jan 100 instead of 2000), 2.5.x appears to have fixed this.  

I'd be willing work on the port, but I don't have any prior experience.
Is there an intro document somewhere that outlines the process?

Daniel

-- 
Daniel Hagan                                             Computer Science CSE
dhagan@cs.vt.edu                                http://www.cs.vt.edu/~dhagan/
